inputs.name: Text input
inputs.value: Animate you're text with a simple, procedural and customizable set of geometry nodes! Fully animatable! Text of near infinite length! Well, that's assuming a lot about Blenders capacity for near infinite text. Which I know nothing about, nor do I intend on looking that up. I'll just say in my long career of using this node since I made it a few weeks ago, I've never run into it's upper character limits. And I take this as good sign. Plenty good enough for the likes of us. What are you going to do? Simulate infinite Monkes and infinite _Typewriters to see how long it takes one of them to type out the entire works of Shakespeare on here? Blender doesn't even have multi-line text editing for hells sake. Buy a Maya license at that point. Or fucking Houdini. Jesus....... Sincerely yours, Joe.
